music.name: Bay-Tek 2026: Perc, Foor, Just Jovani, Miss Crafty, Moonpie, Papa Xanny
music.why: A DIY river-delta camping mission for techno heads who want a real expedition, not a club night
music.summary: A first-edition multi-day techno festival on a floating island in the Sacramento River Delta, July 3-6, with day and night stages, swimming, and car/RV camping. Reached only by ferry, private boat, or your own kayak.

music.name: ILLUM Block Party: deadmau5, Nero, Cristoph b2b Rebuke, Maneki
music.why: Mainstage names without the late-night grind, wrapped by 10pm; the marquee daytime splurge of the weekend
music.summary: An outdoor afternoon block party at The Midway in SF on Saturday, running 3-10pm, with a headliner-stacked house and electronic bill spread across the venue's open-air yard over the July 4th weekend.

music.name: Walshy Fire (Major Lazer) July 4th Holiday Rave
music.address: 2236 Martin Luther King Jr Way, Oakland, CA 94612
music.why: The weekend's dancehall and afrobeats pick; three rooms of Caribbean heat across the bay in Oakland
music.summary: A 21+ late-night Caribbean-style rave on July 4th, 10pm-4am, at Starline Social Club in Oakland, with a Major Lazer member headlining three rooms of dancehall, soca, afrobeats and global sounds.

music.name: After Life: Rebellion w/ Louisahhh
music.why: The 18+ goth-adjacent dark-techno option with a live vocal set; cathartic and heavy, not a goth party
music.summary: An 18+ dark electronica night on July 4th, 9:30pm-2am, above DNA Lounge in SF, with a live hybrid set from the headliner across two rooms spanning darkwave, industrial bass and dark techno.

music.name: BUNT. in the Sacramento Round
music.why: An 18+ daytime block party for the Sacramento crowd; melodic crossover EDM, easy entry age
music.summary: An 18+ outdoor EDM and house block party on Friday July 3 at 3pm in Ali Youssefi Square, Sacramento, presented by All Day All Night with a single headliner for an afternoon-into-evening crowd.

music.name: Elderbrook Day Party
music.address: 1 Avenue of the Palms, San Francisco, CA 94130
music.why: Live performance, not just a DJ, with the best SF skyline view of the weekend; take the ferry
music.summary: A 21+ open-air sunset day party on Friday July 3, 2-9pm at Gold Bar on Treasure Island, a 1939 Art Moderne former airport terminal, featuring a live house headliner with skyline views, food and drinks; ferry access available.

music.name: Goom Gum, Torteline, Thalia
music.why: Catch a buzzy duo's SF debut at an intimate room; melodic, driving and till 4am
music.summary: A 21+ melodic techno and progressive house show on Friday July 3, 10pm-4am, at Halcyon in SF, marking the headlining duo's SF debut on their first US tour with two supporting acts.

music.name: Jayda G Day Party
music.why: Sunday-afternoon rooftop house to ease out of the holiday; cheap entry and a daytime close
music.summary: A house and disco rooftop day party on Sunday July 5, 2-7pm, at 620 Jones in SF, hosted by MAKEROOM! with the headliner taking over the venue alongside support.

music.name: Nora En Pure (4th of July)
music.why: Melodic house in a graffitied factory ruin; the scenic Napa-edge day party for a sundown vibe
music.summary: A 21+ outdoor day party on July 4th at The Ruins, an abandoned 1900s cement factory 25 miles outside SF in American Canyon, running 3-9:30pm with a deep/melodic house headliner, support DJs, full bar and food trucks.

music.name: Pan-Pot, Dean Samaras, Just Jovani
music.why: Proper Berlin techno till 4am at a tight underground room; cheap entry for the all-nighter crowd
music.summary: A 21+ late-night techno and tech-house show on July 4th, 10pm-4am, at Halcyon in SF, headlined by the returning Berlin duo with two supporting DJs on the dance floor.

music.name: Shiba San
music.why: A French tech-house heavyweight doing a rare South Bay club date — not another SF warehouse line-up
music.summary: Tech-house star Shiba San headlines PURE Nightclub in Sunnyvale on Friday July 3. 21+, doors 10pm; lower ticket tiers were already selling out.

music.name: Todd Terje (DJ Set)
music.why: Sunny nu-disco grooves for the late slot; the feel-good club option, not heads-down techno
music.summary: A late-night disco and nu-disco DJ set on July 4th, 9pm-3am, at Public Works in SF, presented by DJ Dials in the club's main room over the holiday weekend.

music.name: Ascension: Wilson Chang, Nikademis, Home By Dawn, Yanebun
music.address: 418 S Market St, San Jose, CA 95113
music.why: The South Bay's melodic-bass night; wear red, catch a debut, skip the drive into the city
music.summary: A 21+ melodic bass and dubstep night on July 4th, 9:30pm-2am, at Era Lounge in San Jose, with a multi-act lineup, a world debut, and a red dress code for the South Bay community.

music.name: Kausmic Campout
music.why: Easy drive-in forest camping with a pool by day and stars by night; nature reset, not a club
music.summary: A 21+ multi-day camping festival July 3-5 on private land in the Sierra Mountains, three hours from SF, with daytime pool-party stages and a big open-air night stage spanning house, tech house, afro house and techno, plus art, sound baths and on-site showers.

music.name: Leah York: Noche de Perreo
music.why: Late perreo with the cheapest cover going; the all-night reggaeton call over the day parties
music.summary: A 21+ reggaeton and perreo night on July 4th, 9pm-3am, at F8 in SF, with the headliner leading a Latin dance party across the holiday weekend.

music.name: Hardcore In The Bay: Ravers In The U.S.A.
music.why: Free happy-hardcore for the kandi kids; bring your UV fit, the most wholesome chaos of the weekend
music.summary: A free 21+ rave on Friday July 3, 9pm-2am, at BuzzWorks in SF, with five DJs spinning happy hardcore, hardstyle and eurodance for the Bay Area kandi community; free with RSVP.

music.name: Kandi Korps 4th of July Massive: Estellita, Moxbpm, MDMAngel, Ihaveabomb
music.why: Ten-dollar warehouse bass massive for the kandi crowd; cheapest deep-rave ticket of the weekend
music.summary: A bass and rave night on July 4th from 10pm at 3rd & Army in SF, billed as a holiday massive with a stacked kandi-scene DJ lineup and more acts to be announced.

music.name: 360 Picnic: Munnday, Damfu, The Homie J, Pulse, JVXX, Devine
music.why: Free, family-friendly, blanket-and-cooler park hang that runs right into the city fireworks
music.summary: A free, all-ages outdoor July 4th picnic at Caldwell Park's Oak Knoll in Redding, 10am until the city fireworks, with all-day 360 DJ sets of house, UK garage and bass, plus games for friends and families.

music.name: Betical at Madarae
music.why: Burning Man-favorite melodic house in a slick club; emotional, indie-leaning, not peak-time pounding
music.summary: A 21+ deep, melodic and afro house night on Friday July 3, 9pm-3am, at Madarae in SF, headlined by the Spanish brother duo behind the viral "Back on 74" rework, with bottle service and tables available.

music.name: Bootie Mashup: Party In The USA 2008–2016
music.why: Throwback Obama-era pop mashups with drag; pure nostalgic fun, zero underground pretension
music.summary: A 21+ pop mashup party on July 4th, 9pm-2am, at Cat Club in SF, with two rooms of Obama-era 2008-2016 mashups, drag and burlesque from The Monster Show, and music-video projections all night.

music.name: Daft Disko: Independence Day
music.why: All French touch, all night; nostalgic disco-house for people who'd rather dance than rave
music.summary: A 21+ French house and disco party on July 4th, 9pm-2am, at Bella in SF, spinning the music of Daft Punk, Justice, Stardust and the wider French touch catalog for the holiday.

music.name: Milpitas Pop-up
music.why: Free South Bay park hang where you can actually sign up to spin; fireworks included
music.summary: A free, all-ages outdoor open-decks pop-up on July 4th, 12-5pm, at Cardoza Park in Milpitas, with community DJs, a special guest from 5-9pm, and the city's free fireworks show after; bring blankets and snacks.

music.name: Perreo En La Mision
music.why: Free perreo in the heart of the Mission; the Latin-night alternative to the techno parties
music.summary: A free 21+ reggaeton, cumbia and Latin house party on July 4th at 9pm at Kilowatt in SF's Mission, presented by SFDJ Collective and Tumbaos to bring the neighborhood out for the holiday.

music.name: Queen Out Pride w/ Tiffany Pollard, Prosperity Room
music.why: Campy pop-and-Pride club energy with a celebrity draw; for the dance-and-sing crowd, not purists
music.summary: A 21+ Pride-themed club night on Friday July 3, 9pm-3am, at Public Works in SF, blending pop and club sounds with a reality-TV personality appearance over the holiday weekend.

music.name: Red, White, and Groove: Alissa, Haux, Vuskiii, DJ Genetixx
music.why: Cheap poolside afternoon house in Sacramento; the swimsuit-and-cocktail call, done by 8pm
music.summary: A 21+ July 4th pool party at Faces Nightclub in Sacramento, 4-8pm, with four DJs spinning house, minimal and tech for an afternoon of dancing and lounging poolside.

music.name: Roddy Lima, Weska
music.why: Big-room tech-house at a proper downtown club; the polished Friday-night option before the holiday
music.summary: A 21+ tech-house and techno nightclub show on Friday July 3 at 10pm at 1015 Folsom in SF, pairing two DJs for a late-night set at the multi-room downtown club.

sports.name: Alameda July 4th Parade R.A.C.E. (5K)
sports.why: Run the parade route before the parade rolls; the family July 4th tradition, not a PR chase
sports.summary: A family-friendly July 4th 5K run/walk starting 8:30am along the Alameda parade route, ending around 11am, timed to set up the town's Independence Day parade.

sports.name: Hercules Dynamite 4th of July 5K
sports.why: Tiny waterfront Bay Trail 5K capped at 250; intimate and kid-free-friendly, not a big-crowd race
sports.summary: A chip-timed July 4th 5K run/walk at 9am along the San Francisco Bay Trail from Hercules to Rodeo and back, capped at 250 entrants, with free entry for kids 10 and under.

sports.name: July 4th Run 5K/10K/13.1
sports.address: Seal Point Park, San Mateo, CA 94401
sports.why: Pick your distance up to a half marathon; the option for runners who actually want mileage on the 4th
sports.summary: A July 4th morning road race at Seal Point Park in San Mateo starting 7:30am, offering 1-mile, 5K, 10K and half-marathon distances for runners and walkers of every level.

sports.name: Kenwood Footrace 10K & 3K
sports.address: Warm Springs Rd & Plaza Park, Kenwood, CA 95452
sports.why: Run through wine-country vineyards then roll into a small-town July 4th parade; the most scenic race option
sports.summary: A July 4th 10K and 3K road race at 7:30am through Sonoma Valley vineyards and rolling hills from Plaza Park in Kenwood, drawing competitive runners and families, followed by the town parade, pancake breakfast and Rotary shindig.

sports.name: Stars & Stripes 5K
sports.why: A low-key East Bay 5K close to home; the easy local July 4th jog, nothing fancy
sports.summary: A July 4th 5K road race starting at 8am in Concord, a small (100-500 runner) East Bay Independence Day run/walk on a flat road course welcoming participants of every level and pace.

sports.name: Sunset Dunes parkrun 5K
sports.address: 1349 Upper Great Hwy, San Francisco, CA 94122
sports.why: Free, no-bib, oceanfront 5K on a car-free highway; the casual no-commitment morning move
sports.summary: A free, weekly timed 5K at 8am along the car-free Upper Great Highway at Sunset Dunes Park in SF, open to runners and walkers of all levels, no race entry required.
